title: XPeng Q4 2023 Earnings Call: Key Highlights and Strategic Initiatives
text: XPeng delivered over 140,000 units in 2023, with Q4 deliveries exceeding 60,000 units representing a 171% year-over-year increase. The company achieved positive full-year operating cash flow for the first time, with over 45 billion RMB in cash reserves. Q4 gross margin reached 6.2%, up from negative 2.7% in Q3. CEO He Xiaopeng emphasized that gross margin improved to 6.2% with vehicle margin expansion of 10 percentage points compared to the previous quarter. The company is launching approximately 30 new models and facelifts over three years. A new sub-brand targeting the 100,000-150,000 RMB price segment debuted at the Beijing Auto Show, with deliveries beginning in Q3 2024. XPeng highlighted its XNGP autonomous driving system claiming industry leader status in terms of active user scale with an 83% monthly active user penetration rate in Saudi Arabia. Volkswagen partnership enabled a master agreement for platform and software collaboration plus joint sourcing programs expected to improve gross margins starting in 2024. Q1 2024 deliveries guided between 21,000-22,500 units, representing 15.2-23.4% year-over-year growth.
